meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Finish Your AI Projects (Advanced Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning your code. Master Claude Code and Antigravity with this advanced checklist designed to help students ship production-ready AI applications.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is technical friction and cognitive overload. By integrating Claude Code’s autonomous CLI capabilities with Antigravity’s structural scaffolding, you reduce development cycle times by 70%. This workflow forces modular progress, turning complex architectural hurdles into manageable, iterative commits that guarantee your project reaches completion.
content.intro:
You have a graveyard of half-baked repositories and abandoned 'next big things' gathering digital dust. The ambition is there, but the bridge between a brilliant idea and a deployed MVP feels like a chasm of endless debugging and scope creep. You aren't failing because you lack talent; you are failing because your development environment lacks the velocity to outpace your own doubt.

Today, we shift your paradigm. By mastering the synergy between Antigravity’s architectural precision and Claude Code’s autonomous engineering, you stop being a student who 'tries to build' and become an architect who ships. This is not about writing more code; it is about orchestrating a smarter, faster, and more resilient development lifecycle.

steps.title: Environment Orchestration
steps.description: Establish a robust project skeleton that prevents spaghetti code before the first line is written.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a professional SaaS project structure with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind, ensuring modular architecture for future AI integration.

steps.title: Contextual Knowledge Injection
steps.description: Feed Claude the technical constraints so it doesn't hallucinate invalid libraries or deprecated patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current architecture and generate a .claude-ignore and context profile to focus Claude on core business logic.

steps.title: Iterative Feature Implementation
steps.description: Break massive requirements into atomic, verifiable tasks that Claude can tackle autonomously.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Decompose the user authentication feature into 5 granular implementation steps with clear testing criteria for each.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement authentication module based on step 1 plan'

steps.title: Automated Quality Assurance
steps.description: Force Claude to write tests before implementation to ensure code stability during rapid iteration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest integration tests for the newly created API routes, ensuring 90% coverage before deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'write and execute unit tests for current module'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Hardening
steps.description: Automate the path to production so the final step of your project is just a git push.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a Vercel-ready CI/CD pipeline that runs my test suite on every pull request.

pro_tips: Use Claude Code's 'review' flag on every PR to catch architectural flaws before they become technical debt.
Map your project structure to a physical 'Kanban' board; never let Claude build more than one ticket without a manual verify.
Inject your own style guide into the Antigravity prompt to ensure the output matches your preferred coding conventions.
Always use the --verbose flag when Claude is stuck to debug the reasoning chain in real-time.
Treat your '.claude' configuration as part of your IP; version control it like your source code.
content.next_steps: Once your first module is deployed, use the 'Claude review' command to audit your codebase for performance bottlenecks and refactor accordingly.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the workflow, and the roadmap. The only thing missing is the execution. Stop waiting for the 'perfect' time to start. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
